ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of representation */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "weight_category" TEXT /* Weight category for the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach associated with the athlete */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the athlete */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the athlete */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Current training status of the athlete */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered with the federation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., World Cup, Championships) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "attendance_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees for the event */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for athlete registration */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fights" (
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fight */,
  "blue_athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete competing in blue corner */,
  "white_athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete competing in white corner */,
  "blue_score" INTEGER /* Score for the blue athlete */,
  "white_score" INTEGER /* Score for the white athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event in which the fight took place */,
  "fight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the fight */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the fight */,
  "judge1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first judge for the fight */,
  "judge2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second judge for the fight */,
  "judge3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third judge for the fight */,
  "fight_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fight type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_white_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("white_athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_judge2_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge2_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_blue_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("blue_athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_fight_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fight_type_id") REFERENCES fight_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_judge3_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge3_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_judge1_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge1_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fight related to the score */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete receiving the score */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the athlete */,
  "rank_change" TEXT /* Change in ranking points for the athlete */,
  "judge1_score" INTEGER /* Score from the first judge */,
  "judge2_score" INTEGER /* Score from the second judge */,
  "judge3_score" INTEGER /* Score from the third judge */,
  "referee_score" INTEGER /* Score from the referee */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score after adjudication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_fight_id FOREIGN KEY ("fight_id") REFERENCES fights ("fight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the athlete */,
  "ranking_position" INTEGER /* Current position in the ranking */,
  "weight_category" TEXT /* Weight category for the ranking */,
  "rank_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for account access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for notifications and password recovery */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fight related to the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., score, time, penalty) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_fight_id FOREIGN KEY ("fight_id") REFERENCES fights ("fight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the athlete in the event */,
  "total_fights" INTEGER /* Total number of fights participated in the event */,
  "medal_won" TEXT /* Medal won by the athlete */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned from the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fight_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fight type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fight type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fight type */,
  "duration_limit" TEXT /* Maximum duration of the fight type */,
  "point_system" TEXT /* Point system used in the fight type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fight_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fight result */,
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fight */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning athlete */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing athlete */,
  "win_method" TEXT /* Method of victory (e.g., Ippon, Waza-ari) */,
  "fight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the fight */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the fight */,
  "judge1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first judge for the fight */,
  "judge2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second judge for the fight */,
  "judge3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third judge for the fight */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score after adjudication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_results_judge1_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge1_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_results_judge3_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge3_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_results_judge2_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge2_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fight_results_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "qualification_requirements" TEXT /* Qualification requirements for the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., attended, registered, no-show) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete registered for the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date when the athlete attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that the user is allowed to perform (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
